Record every unproductive probe in failed_probes so it is never repeated, and tag claims VERIFIED(step N) or HYPOTHESIS.

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
I can see the avatar is now very close to the charcoal shape on the left side of the divider. The avatar is at col ~24 and charcoal at col ~30 (or they might be overlapping now). Let me check the current state and see if overlapping the charcoal with the avatar does anything special.
From the image, the avatar (black with dots) and the charcoal shape (dark gray) appear to be adjacent or overlapping. Let me check the segmentation to see their exact positions.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Current state:")
for n in seg:
    if n['pixels'] > 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        r, c = min([p[0] for p in b]), min([p[1] for p in b])
        print(f"  {n['color']}: top=({r},{c}), pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check if avatar and charcoal merged
# From image: avatar and charcoal are very close/overlapping
# Let me try DOWN to see if that does something different
action(['DOWN'])
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"game_tier": {"action_semantics": {"RIGHT": "Moves avatar +3 cols right, charcoal moves -3 (opposite)", "LEFT": "Moves avatar -3 cols left, charcoal moves +3 (opposite)", "DOWN": "Moves avatar +3 rows down, charcoal moves -3 (opposite)", "UP": "Moves avatar -3 rows up, charcoal moves +3 (opposite)", "SPACE": "Moves avatar UP 3 rows only in specific conditions", "MOUSE": "No effect", "ACTION7": "No effect"}, "object_taxonomy": {"black_with_dots": "Player avatar", "charcoal_shape": "Moves OPPOSITE to avatar", "yellow_shape": "Target - moves opposite to avatar", "sky_blue_strip": "Vertical divider at cols 30-32"}, "hud_map": {"right_col": "Yellow strip - shrinking"}, "win_pattern": {}, "level_log": {}, "cross_level_notes": ""}, "level_tier": {"world_model": "Avatar crossed divider, now near charcoal on left side. They may be overlapping.", "goal_model": "Maybe need to overlap avatar with charcoal? Or reach a specific position?", "recent_findings": ["Crossing divider possible, avatar now on left side"], "open_questions": ["What completes the level?"], "current_plan": "Try DOWN to see if position matters", "strategy_log": ["tried crossing divider: no completion", "tried approaching charcoal"], "failed_probes": ["ACTION7", "MOUSE", "SPACE", "RIGHT merge"]}}
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
